name: @intentsolutionsio/ollama-local-ai
description: Run AI models locally with Ollama - free alternative to OpenAI, Anthropic, and other paid LLM APIs. Zero-cost, privacy-first AI infrastructure.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install ollama-local-ai\\n  or /plugin install ollama-local-ai@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
